title: Algorithmic efficiency is everywhere for all to see Now we just need the speed run line to show how close Opus 4.6 is to optimal

content.summary: Algorithmic efficiency is everywhere for all to see Now we just need the speed run line to show how close Opus 4.6 is to optimal Benjamin Todd (@ben_j_todd) Opus 4.6 is hugely better at Pokemon: • Opus 4.0 took 1,000 hours to get half way through • Opus 4.5 could almost finish in 1,000 hours • Opus 4.6 was another 10x faster! — https://nitter.net/ben_j_todd/status/2034978509332853239#m
